revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Taxobox colour/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:Taxobox colour/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Template:Taxobox colour/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Taxobox colour/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Taxobox colour/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[:en:Template:Sets taxobox colour|Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[:en:Template:Sets taxobox colour|Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[:en:Template:Sets taxobox colour|Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[:en:Template:Sets taxobox colour|Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[:en:Template:Sets taxobox colour|Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk}} Note to template editors: Edits to the taxonomic terms (taxa) in this template depend for their effect in manual taxoboxes on the colour-determining taxon being at a rank allowed to change the taxobox colour by {{tl|Taxobox}}, so this may need altering. Colours must be defined using the rgb(..,..,..) format to enable {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} to work correctly. == Purpose == This template is one of a number of configuration templates used in the taxobox system, in this case in both [[Template:Taxobox|manual]] and [[WP:Automated taxobox system|automated taxoboxes]]. It generates the appropriate colour for a taxobox. It should only be used by other taxobox templates. === Use by taxonomy templates === Manual taxoboxes call this template from {{tl|Taxobox}}, which looks at the values of ranks given in the taxobox from phylum upwards and uses the taxobox colour for the first colour-setting taxon found (or the error colour if none is found). {{tl|Sets taxobox colour}} is used to decide whether a taxon is colour-setting, which it does by using this template. Automated taxoboxes use a function in [[Module:Autotaxobox]], which finds a colour-setting taxon by searching up the taxonomic hierarchy coded in taxonomy templates (i.e. templates with names of the form "Taxonomy/''taxon-name''"). === Setting colour within a taxobox === Both manual and automatic taxoboxes usually generate their colours automatically. If this fails, or if for some reason the automatically generated colour should be over-ridden, {{para|color_as}} can be used to set the colour based on a supplied taxon. Thus: | color_as = Animalia within a taxobox forces its colour to be the one appropriate for animal taxoboxes. The taxon given as the value of {{para|color_as}} must be in the switch statement in this template. Thus {{para|color_as|Felis}} fails and assigns the error colour. ==Taxobox colour scheme== {{Taxobox colour scheme}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Taxoboxes with the error color}} * {{clc|Taxoboxes with no color}} == Supporting templates == * [[:en:Template:Sets taxobox colour|Template:Sets taxobox colour]] * [[Template:Taxobox/Error colour]] == See also == Other configuration modules and templates include: *[[Module:Taxobox ranks]] – sets properties of ranks used in taxonomy templates, such as their English equivalents *{{tl|Principal rank}} – defines the Linnaean principal ranks that are shown by default in automated taxoboxes *{{tl|Is italic taxon}} – defines which ranks cause taxon names to be italicized in automated taxoboxes {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Taxobox templates]] [[Category:Template implementation details]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
